visa_types.name: Sports And Cultural
visa_types.documents_required:
Dear Applicant;
Please click for the required documents. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4czM3woZXlQM9j1aLV8xDx/f0db4c37f872c22cb1bf5916b096fad5/Sports-and-Cultural_Checklist-2026.pdf) 
Attention Please:
- If the applicant does not have his own income, he must obtain a commitment from the sponsor that he will cover the expenses from the notary public for the day of his stay. Please call our call center for details about the letter of commitment.
- It’s recommended to provide the necessary documents for faster visa process.
- It’s not sure that you will get a visa even if you submit all your applications documents, only the consulate will be deciding about the visa process result.
- VFS Global has no effect about visa process result and does not advice or suggest to the applicants about their visa result.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:   Sports And Cultural]
Attention Please :
- Except from visa fee,there will be 30 Euro service fee charged for each applications.
- Visa fee is accepted only in Euro and in cash.
- All payments are non-refundable.
- Courier is an optinal service which will be charged 12 Euro.
- Credit Card is not valid for the payments.
- EU citizens and their children are exempted from visa fees.
- Please note :In Visa Application Centres payments with 500 Euro banknotes are not accepted.

Please note that in some cases, the process may take longer than the specified time. We recommend that you submit your application as early as possible, taking into account these situations.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Sports and Cultural category visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Malta for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters for people wishing to visit Malta
                                                                        with purpose of participation in Scientific, Cultural or Sport event. 
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Sports and Cultural category visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Malta for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters for people wishing to visit Malta
                                                                        with purpose of participation in Scientific, Cultural or Sport event. 
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Jurisdiction to apply for Maltese visa
There is no restrictions on the Maltese visas jurisdiction. Prospective applicants are free to apply for Maltese visas from any of the Visa Application centres accross Turkey and collect
                                                                        processed passports from the same.

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Sports And Cultural]
Attention Please :
- Except from visa fee,there will be 30 Euro service fee charged for each applications.
- Visa fee is accepted only in Euro and in cash.
- All payments are non-refundable.
- Courier is an optinal service which will be charged 12 Euro.
- Credit Card is not valid for the payments.
- EU citizens and their children are exempted from visa fees.
- Please note :In Visa Application Centres payments with 500 Euro banknotes are not accepted.

## Documents Required
Dear Applicant;
Please click for the required documents. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4czM3woZXlQM9j1aLV8xDx/f0db4c37f872c22cb1bf5916b096fad5/Sports-and-Cultural_Checklist-2026.pdf) 
Attention Please:
- If the applicant does not have his own income, he must obtain a commitment from the sponsor that he will cover the expenses from the notary public for the day of his stay. Please call our call center for details about the letter of commitment.
- It’s recommended to provide the necessary documents for faster visa process.
- It’s not sure that you will get a visa even if you submit all your applications documents, only the consulate will be deciding about the visa process result.
- VFS Global has no effect about visa process result and does not advice or suggest to the applicants about their visa result.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph  submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following  specifications:
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be sized between 35 – 45 mm
- Full face taken straight forward 30 mm
from point of the chin to top of hair
- Taken against a white background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
For further details with samples click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6AwBQ5cPUFb2acDWLHGQQ8/fa2cc0c4399fcb89fe41856739599a15/photo_specifications.pdf).
Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos.

## Processing Time
If all the required documents are submitted, visa applications are usually finalized within a period of time that may vary, except for the day you apply to the Visa Application Center and the day required to send the documents to Istanbul. Please note that in some cases, the process may take longer than the specified time. We recommend that you submit your application as early as possible, taking into account these situations.

## Download Forms

Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3SGRxjLFKF4QxQY6GdHSLK/88a0bd99c280fb76909cc9bec1dd2335/Schengen-VISA-Application-latest-version-ENG-TR-2024.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
 This visa category is valid for tourist visits to Malta. 
Applicants must submit the necessary documents belonging to this category so that the process is not prolonged.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

Applicants must submit the necessary documents belonging to this category so that the process is not prolonged.

## Jurisdiction to apply for Maltese visa
There is no restrictions on the Maltese visas jurisdiction. Prospective applicants are free to apply for Maltese visas from any of the Visa Application centres accross Turkey and collect
                                                                        processed passports from the same.

## Visa Fees

Attention Please :
- Except from visa fee,there will be 30 Euro service fee charged for each applications.
- Visa fee is accepted only in Euro and in cash.
- All payments are non-refundable.
- Courier is an optinal service which will be charged 12 Euro.
- Credit Card is not valid for the payments.
- EU citizens and their children are exempted from visa fees.
- Please note: In Visa Application Centres payments with 500 Euro banknotes are not accepted.

Attention Please:
- If the applicant does not have his own income, he must obtain a commitment from the sponsor that he will cover the expenses from the notary public for the day of his stay. Please call our call center for details about the letter of commitment.
- It’s recommended to provide the necessary documents for faster visa process.
- It’s not sure that you will get a visa even if you submit all your applications documents, only the consulate will be deciding about the visa process result.
- VFS Global has no effect about visa process result and does not advice or suggest to the applicants about their visa result.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph  submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following  specifications:
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be sized between 35 – 45 mm
- Full face taken straight forward 30 mm from point of the chin to top of hair
- Taken against a white background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
For further details with samples click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6AwBQ5cPUFb2acDWLHGQQ8/fa2cc0c4399fcb89fe41856739599a15/photo_specifications.pdf).
Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos.

## Processing Time
If all the required documents are submitted, visa applications are usually finalized within a period of time that may vary, except for the day you apply to the Visa Application Center and the day required to send the documents to Istanbul. Please note that in some cases, the process may take longer than the specified time. We recommend that you submit your application as early as possible, taking into account these situations.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Information for EU/EEA family members applying for  a visa to enter the Schengen area As a family member of an EU/EEA citizen  exercising their right of free movement in accordance with Directive 2004/38/EC  you have the right to move to Malta together with your family member or join to  them in the area to settle there.
PLEASE NOTE that Maltese citizen living in Malta  NOT exercising EU treaty rights and they do  therefore NOT hold a right of residence based on Directive 2004/38/EC in their  home country, unless they have recently moved back to Sweden from another  EU/EEA country.
Family members are:
Family members are the spouse; registered  partner of the EU citizen, the direct descendants who are under the age of 21  or dependants and those of the spouse or partner, the dependent direct relative  in the ascending line and those of the spouse.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Information for EU/EEA family members applying for  a visa to enter the Schengen area As a family member of an EU/EEA citizen  exercising their right of free movement in accordance with Directive 2004/38/EC  you have the right to move to Malta together with your family member or join to  them in the area to settle there.
PLEASE NOTE that Maltese citizen living in Malta  NOT exercising EU treaty rights and they do  therefore NOT hold a right of residence based on Directive 2004/38/EC in their  home country, unless they have recently moved back to Sweden from another  EU/EEA country.
Family members are:
Family members are the spouse; registered  partner of the EU citizen, the direct descendants who are under the age of 21  or dependants and those of the spouse or partner, the dependent direct relative  in the ascending line and those of the spouse.

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Family members of EU/EEA or Swiss nationals ]
Attention Please :
- Except from visa fee,there will be 30 Euro service fee charged for each applications.
- Visa fee is accepted only in Euro and in cash.
- All payments are non-refundable.
- Courier is an optinal service which will be charged 12 Euro.
- Credit Card is not valid for the payments.
- EU citizens and their children are exempted from visa fees.
- Please note:In Visa Application Centres payments with 500 Euro banknotes are not accepted.

## Documents Required
Dear Applicant;

Please click for the required documents. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4Q4YPkGqMoRp0wqngJ5r6i/45562ac74bcbcb2baab09e02c4869490/EU-EEA-or-Swiss-Nationals_Checklist-2026.pdf)
Attention Please:
- It’s recommended to provide the necessary documents for faster visa process.
- It’s not sure that you will get a visa even if you submit all your applications documents, only the consulate will be deciding about the visa process result.
- VFS Global has no effect about visa process result and does not advice or suggest to the applicants about their visa result.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph  submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following  specifications:
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be sized between 35 – 45 mm
- Full face taken straight forward 30 mm
from point of the chin to top of hair
- Taken against a white background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
For further details with samples click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6AwBQ5cPUFb2acDWLHGQQ8/fa2cc0c4399fcb89fe41856739599a15/photo_specifications.pdf).
Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos.

## Processing Time
If all the required documents are submitted, visa applications are usually finalized within a period of time that may vary, except for the day you apply to the Visa Application Center and the day required to send the documents to Istanbul. Please note that in some cases, the process may take longer than the specified time. We recommend that you submit your application as early as possible, taking into account these situations.

## Download Forms

visa_types.name: Erasmus Internship
visa_types.documents_required:
Dear Applicant;
Please click for the required documents. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7yeivXMOR2PlVHPbxMFkcF/d20d726495e1881f058bde9c54d81cb6/Erasmus_Checklist-2026.pdf)
Attention Please:
If the applicant does not have his own income, a commitment from the notary public that he will cover the expenses from the person who covers his expenses from 48 € per day until the day of stay is required. Please call our call center for details about the undertaking.
If the applicant is a student and has not completed the age of 18, he/she will be exempted from the visa fee if he/she brings a 4A service statement from e-government stating that he/she has never worked before.
If there is a wet signed and stamped grant letter from the applicant's school in Turkey, there is no need for a commitment.
It is recommended that the documents in the list be submitted in full so that the processing process is not prolonged.
Submission of all documents does not guarantee obtaining a visa, the decision rests with the consulate in all circumstances.
VFS Global does not give advice or guidance that will affect the decision regarding the visa process, the application is the person's own responsibility.

Attention Please :

- Visa fee is accepted only in Euro and in cash.

- Courier is an optinal service which will be charged 12 Euro.
- Credit Card is not valid for the payments.
- EU citizens and their children are exempted from visa fees.
- Please note :In Visa Application Centres payments with 500 Euro banknotes are not accepted.

## Overview
This category of application is suitable for those who have participated in an Erasmus internship.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Jurisdiction to apply for Maltese visa
There is no restrictions on the Maltese visas jurisdiction. Prospective applicants are free to apply for Maltese visas from any of the Visa Application centres accross Turkey and collect
                                                                        processed passports from the same.

Attention Please:
If the applicant does not have his own income, a commitment from the notary public that he will cover the expenses from the person who covers his expenses from 48 € per day until the day of stay is required. Please call our call center for details about the undertaking.
If the applicant is a student and has not completed the age of 18, he/she will be exempted from the visa fee if he/she brings a 4A service statement from e-government stating that he/she has never worked before.
If there is a wet signed and stamped grant letter from the applicant's school in Turkey, there is no need for a commitment.
It is recommended that the documents in the list be submitted in full so that the processing process is not prolonged.
Submission of all documents does not guarantee obtaining a visa, the decision rests with the consulate in all circumstances.
VFS Global does not give advice or guidance that will affect the decision regarding the visa process, the application is the person's own responsibility.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph  submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following  specifications:
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be sized between 35 – 45 mm
- Full face taken straight forward 30 mm
from point of the chin to top of hair
- Taken against a white background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons

Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos.

## Processing Time
If all the required documents are submitted, visa applications are usually finalized within a period of time that may vary, except for the day you apply to the Visa Application Center and the day required to send the documents to Istanbul. Please note that in some cases, the process may take longer than the specified time. We recommend that you submit your application as early as possible, taking into account these situations.

visa_types.name: Short Stay Visa
visa_types.overview:
A visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Malta for a limited period of time. The short stay C visas can are submitted to Visa Application Centres in Ankara, İstanbul (Harbiye), İstanbul (Altunizade), İzmir, Bursa, Gaziantep, Edirne, Antalya, and Trabzon.
Please click on each of the above tab for detail information.
visa_types.full_text:
A visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Malta for a limited period of time. The short stay C visas can are submitted to Visa Application Centres in Ankara, İstanbul (Harbiye), İstanbul (Altunizade), İzmir, Bursa, Gaziantep, Edirne, Antalya, and Trabzon.
Please click on each of the above tab for detail information.

- Except from visa fee,there will be 30 Euro service fee charged for each applications.
- Visa fee is accepted only in Euro and in cash.
- All payments are non-refundable.
- Courier is an optinal service which will be charged 12 Euro.
- Credit Card is not valid for the payments.
- EU citizens and their children are exempted from visa fees.
- Please note :In Visa Application Centres payments with 500 Euro banknotes are not accepted.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visit to Family or Friends visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Malta for a limited period of time. This category of visa is for people wishing visit the member of his/her family or friend.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visit to Family or Friends visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Malta for a limited period of time. This category of visa is for people wishing visit the member of his/her family or friend.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Jurisdiction to apply for Maltese visa
There is no restrictions on the Maltese visas jurisdiction. Prospective applicants are free to apply for Maltese visas from any of the Visa Application centres accross Turkey and collect
                                                                        processed passports from the same.

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Visiting Family And Friends]
Attention Please :
- Except from visa fee,there will be 30 Euro service fee charged for each applications.
- Visa fee is accepted only in Euro and in cash.
- All payments are non-refundable.
- Courier is an optinal service which will be charged 12 Euro.
- Credit Card is not valid for the payments.
- EU citizens and their children are exempted from visa fees.
- Please note :In Visa Application Centres payments with 500 Euro banknotes are not accepted.

## Documents Required
Dear Applicant;
Please click for the required documents. 
Attention Please:
- If the applicant does not have his own income, he must obtain a commitment from the sponsor that he will cover the expenses from the notary public for the day of his stay. Please call our call center for details about the letter of commitment.
- It’s recommended to provide the necessary documents for faster visa process.
- It’s not sure that you will get a visa even if you submit all your applications documents, only the consulate will be deciding about the visa process result.
- VFS Global has no effect about visa process result and does not advice or suggest to the applicants about their visa result.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph  submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following  specifications:
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be sized between 35 – 45 mm
- Full face taken straight forward 30 mm
from point of the chin to top of hair
- Taken against a white background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
For further details with samples click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6AwBQ5cPUFb2acDWLHGQQ8/fa2cc0c4399fcb89fe41856739599a15/photo_specifications.pdf).
Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos.

## Processing Time
If all the required documents are submitted, visa applications are usually finalized within a period of time that may vary, except for the day you apply to the Visa Application Center and the day required to send the documents to Istanbul. Please note that in some cases, the process may take longer than the specified time. We recommend that you submit your application as early as possible, taking into account these situations.

## Download Forms

Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3SGRxjLFKF4QxQY6GdHSLK/88a0bd99c280fb76909cc9bec1dd2335/Schengen-VISA-Application-latest-version-ENG-TR-2024.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
 Business visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Malta for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters for people wishing visit Malta for work reasons (to
                                                                        sign the contract, participate in business meeting etc) but does not allow to carry out the professional activity. 
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
 Business visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Malta for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters for people wishing visit Malta for work reasons (to
                                                                        sign the contract, participate in business meeting etc) but does not allow to carry out the professional activity. 
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Jurisdiction to apply for Maltese visa
There is no restrictions on the Maltese visas jurisdiction. Prospective applicants are free to apply for Maltese visas from any of the Visa Application centres accross Turkey and collect

- Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
